TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Beji_Caid_Essebsi, title = Beji_Caid_Essebsi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Beji_Caid_Essebsi} }

S.FORM: I 1926 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 29 a romi'ad masofoc ci Beji Caid Essebsi , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Tunisia anini i ci Beji Caid Essebsi, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 31 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i b~b~v…ôji ¶ai…¨~…ģ …ôss…ôb~b~vsi , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u to~u~unisia anini i ¶i b~b~v…ôji ¶ai…¨~…ģ …ôss…ôb~b~vsi, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1926 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 29 a romi'ad masofoc ci Beji Caid Essebsi , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Tunisia anini i ci Beji Caid Essebsi, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 31 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i b~b~v…ôji ¶ai…¨~…ģ …ôss…ôb~b~vsi , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u to~u~unisia anini i ¶i b~b~v…ôji ¶ai…¨~…ģ …ôss…ôb~b~vsi, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
